name: Potential Svchost Memory Access
notes:
This rule detects potential access to svchost process memory such as that used by Invoke-Phantom to kill the winRM windows event logging service.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tim Burrell
SIGMA Title: Suspect Svchost Memory Asccess
SIGMA Description: Detects suspect access to svchost process memory such as that used by Invoke-Phantom to kill the winRM windows event logging service.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\svchost.exe%' AQL filter query
when the event matches Granted Access (custom) contains any of 0x1F3FFF
when the event matches Call Trace (custom) contains any of UNKNOWN
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\microsoft visual studio%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msbuild\current\bin\msbuild.exe%' AQL filter query
when the event matches Call Trace (custom) contains any of [Microsoft.Build.ni.dll or System.ni.dll]
TD_list: APPLY Potential Svchost Memory Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\svchost.exe%' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Granted Access (custom) contains any of 0x1F3FFF
AND when the event matches Call Trace (custom) contains any of UNKNOWN

AND when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\microsoft visual studio%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msbuild\current\bin\msbuild.exe%' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Call Trace (custom) contains any of [Microsoft.Build.ni.dll or System.ni.dll]
RED_list: Event name: Potential Svchost Memory Access
Event description: Detects potential access to svchost process memory such as that used by Invoke-Phantom to kill the winRM windows event logging service.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
